title: Media Room - Canada.ca
content:
If you are a journalist and you cannot find what you are looking for, please contact our media relations team . All questions from the general public should be directed to our general inquiries centre.
- Advisories, Warnings and Recalls
For topical information on health and safety issues, consult the fact sheets in the It's Your Health section.
- Canadian Food Inspection Agency News Room
- Canadian Institutes of Health Research Media Centre
- Public Health Agency of Canada Media Room
Get more news and information from the Government of Canada.
